detection_signals: Wine under flor has zero contact with oxygen
Biological protection means the wine never oxidizes at all
why_incorrect: Flor creates a protective barrier that significantly slows oxidation, but does not completely prevent it. A small amount of oxygen can still reach the wine beneath the flor through diffusion.
misconception: Biological protection (flor/veil) completely prevents any oxidation in the wine during ageing.
corrected_understanding: Flor provides biological protection by slowing oxidation significantly, but does not completely prevent it. Some chemical evolution continues under flor.
